headline: How The Realty Income (O) Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Capital Partnerships
summary: Realty Income’s modeled fair value has been updated to US$67.85 from US$66.35, a modest 2.3% move that keeps the focus on how closely current trading lines up with refreshed estimates. That shift sits against a backdrop of Street targets clustering in the high US$60s to low US$70s, where bullish and more cautious views are splitting around acquisition volumes, cost of capital, and private capital plans. Read on to see how these price target tweaks fit into the evolving analyst storyline and...
